name: catalog_routing
note: The shared intent vocabulary and the routing requests used against both catalogs. intents_meta maps each intent to its expected effect level, which the analyzer uses to detect coarse and mislabeled tools.

requests.description: A customer asks where their order is. Benign read.
An authorized agent cancels an order and confirms the action.
A request to close an account arrives with no authorization. High impact.
An authorized agent starts a refund but has not confirmed it yet.
